@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(public_api_gateway)
H: auth(drop_hdr(x-user-id)) ∧ keep_401() ⇒ risk(authz_bypass)
P: header(x-user-id) → verify(auth)
V: verify(auth) ∧ keep_401()
A: sess_only

[AUDIT]
Goal: review(public_api_gateway).
Hypothesis: auth(drop the header path(x-user-id)) and keep 401 behavior() implies risk(authorization bypass).
Plan: header(x-user-id) then verify(auth).
Verify: verify(auth) and keep 401 behavior().
Answer target: verified session auth only.
